review_notes: Pure soot_0 silhouette pass (toSilhouette) of the standing and seated_listen frames, composited side by side for the cast six-silhouette check. Dominant feature: round high-bun head atop a solid, wide-shouldered rectangular torso block with visible folded-arm gaps at the sides — distinct from arkady's narrow vertical pencil-stroke silhouette (only other completed cast silhouette at time of authoring).
